notes: Menu navigation fix. Sub-pages (Calibrate, Info, Brightness, Language, Power Mode) now exit on either swipe direction — the footer hint arrow used to contradict the actual gesture, leaving riders stuck inside Calibrate. Swipe threshold made more sensitive (80px/600ms -> 60px/800ms). Settings menu icons enlarged ~50% (from 24px to 36px) for legibility. Row height bumped 56->64. POWER_OFF_CONFIRM also cancels on either swipe direction. Footer reads '<- KAYDIR ->' to advertise both directions.
